chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA. Constitutional Petition No.D- 209 of 2024. DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE 1.For orders on office objection as flag A. 2.For hearing of main case. 27.3.2025. Petitioner is present in person. Mr. Liaquat Ali Shar, A.A.G assisted by Mr.Aftab Ahmed Bhutto, Asstt: A.G. ====== At the very outset, learned A.A.G while referring to the comments submitted by the respondents No.1 to 4 states that the requisite information as desired by the petitioner has been given by the respondents and copy whereof was given to the petitioner. When confronted, the petitioner present in person after going through the documents as well as comments filed by the respondents No.1 to 4, he would approach the respondents if needed, meanwhile seeks disposal of the petition alongwith pending applications, if any. Learned Addl. A.G has no objection. Order accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Shabir/P.S
